nominee.name: Name

nominee.nidFrontDesc: Upload the front side of NID
nominee.nidBackDesc: Upload the back side of NID
nominee.disclaimerMessage: You have {remainingShare}% of your share remaining to allocate to your next nominees.
nominee.error: Only JPG, PNG, JPEG  files are allowed
nominee.error2: You can only upload up to {maxCount} files.
nominee.nomineeLimit: No more than three people can be nominated.
nominee.fileLimit: and maximum file size should be 5MB
nominee.mobileDigitsOnly: Mobile number must contain only digits
nominee.mobileInvalid: Please enter a valid mobile number
nominee.addressInvalid: Address must contain letters and numbers
nominee.nidLength: NID number must be 10, 13, or 17 characters long
nominee.passportMinLength: Passport number must be at least 6 characters
nominee.passportMaxLength: Passport number must be at most 9 characters
nominee.birthCertLength: Birth Certificate must be 17 characters long
nominee.drivingLicenseNumberMin: Driving license number must be at least 10 characters.
nominee.drivingLicenseNumberMax: Driving license number must be at most 30 characters.
nominee.drivingLicenseAlphanumeric: Driving license number must be alphanumeric only.
nominee.guardianNidLength: Guardian NID number must be 10, 13, or 17 characters long
nominee.guardianPassportMinLength: Guardian Passport number must be at least 6 characters
nominee.guardianPassportMaxLength: Guardian Passport number must be at most 9 characters
nominee.guardianPassportAlphanumeric: Guardian Passport number must be alphanumeric
nominee.guardianBirthCertRequired: Guardian Birth Certificate number is required
nominee.guardianBirthCertLength: Guardian Birth Certificate must be 13, or 17 characters long
nominee.dobFutureNotAllowed: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
